meaning: n.气窗,横窗,横梁,结构中横向构件
examples: Her name and port of registration (Jersey) are painted on her transom in navy blue.
The transom condition for speed displacement ships is discussed.
Transom and cockpit components sorted and being moved to the boat.
Every time the gurney lurched over a transom, the boy winced in pain.
The backless transom on the custom-made boat isn't for easier dumping, he says.
